steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase though it seemed sets up a contrast between the initial perception (blank) and the actual outcome (eventually solved).

steps.title: Match the contrast
steps.content: „Insuperable” (impossible to solve) creates the strongest contrast with the conjecture being eventually resolved. The other choices either describe clarity (unequivocal), criticism (irreproachable), or inevitability (ineluctable)—none align with the needed contradiction. That matches choice A — A is correct.
